latestIgtvVideos.title: GOOD MORNING AMERICA 🇺🇸🥰❤️
latestIgtvVideos.caption: This was the most funniest and unforgettable moment in my whole life! 🤩 @goodmorningamerica

latestPosts.caption:
THE END.

How an almost non English speaking cleaner from the small country of Finland ended up reaching nearly 30 million cleaning followers… I honestly don’t know.

But what I do know is that without you, I would have never been able to show my cleaning skills or help so many people along the way 🩷

So many of you let me into your homes during the hardest moments of your lives and I’ll be forever grateful for that trust🙏

@scrubdaddy @scrubdaddyuk and @sinicleaning were never just partners to me. They were people who walked beside me and believed in me. Letting go of them has been one of the hardest parts of this decision 🥺Luckily, every time I clean, I’ll still be using their products and remembering everything we shared 🩷

Some people think I’m stupid for not continuing when I easily could. But the truth is… money or being visible has never motivated me. I’ve never wanted to collect as much wealth as possible or stay in the spotlight. What matters to me is doing something good in life and living through my cleaning passion.

I will continue working in the cleaning world But I just don’t yet know how or where. Thanks to you I can stay home with my baby for as long as I want and I’m endlessly grateful for that 🥹🩷 And luckily, babies bring their own messes, because even ordinary cleaning feels beautiful to me now.

So many important people are missing from this list but I know they know how much they mean to me 🩷

A little new cleaner has entered my life… or who knows what they’ll become 🤭🥰

Your cleaner 
Aurikatariina

From total chaos to fresh and cozy ✨
